individual_test_solutions.name: Java 8 (New)
individual_test_solutions.description: Measures knowledge of core Java 8 programming concepts including syntax, OOP, collections, and exception handling.

individual_test_solutions.name: OPQ32r
individual_test_solutions.description: Occupational Personality Questionnaire measuring 32 personality characteristics relevant to workplace performance, including stakeholder management and influence.

individual_test_solutions.name: General Ability Test (GIA)
individual_test_solutions.description: A general measure of cognitive ability covering verbal, numerical, and inductive reasoning.

individual_test_solutions.name: SHL Verify Interactive - Inductive Reasoning
individual_test_solutions.description: Measures inductive/logical reasoning ability using interactive item types.

individual_test_solutions.name: Global Skills Assessment (GSA)
individual_test_solutions.description: Broad multi-skill assessment covering a range of technical and workplace skills used for early career hiring.

individual_test_solutions.name: Python (New)
individual_test_solutions.description: Assesses knowledge of Python programming including syntax, data structures, and core libraries.

individual_test_solutions.name: Situational Judgement Test - Customer Service
individual_test_solutions.description: Presents realistic customer-service scenarios to assess judgement and decision-making.

individual_test_solutions.name: Workplace Personality Inventory (WPI)
individual_test_solutions.description: Assesses personality traits relevant to workplace behavior, teamwork, and leadership potential.
